sentence: Although sneaker waves are not currently at red alert level, the beach is only accessible from the viewpoint.
raw_excerpt: ous conditions at the beach caused by stormy weather and high waves. Although sneaker waves are not currently at red alert level, the beach is only accessible from the viewpoint. Please respect the closures and safety instructions. Black beach is as dangerous as it is beautiful because of “ Sneaker-waves “. In addition to the waves is a danger of falling rocks from the cliff. Please take note of the current conditions at the beach. Ensure your own safety and take all the precautions necessary. Keep in mind at all times Stay well back from the water’s edge Never turn your back
